---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Who would benefit from it?

## Example

Provide a specific example of how this feature would be used:

```typescript
// Example code or usage
```

## Priority

- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (should have)
- [ ] High (must have)

## Associated Issues

Link any related issues: Fixes/Related to #(issue number)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or diagrams about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature is not already requested
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the use case
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
